chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2071 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 22-12-2025 M/s Ali Ahmed Khan and Bilwal Ahmed Soomro, Advocates for the Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh along with SIP Ali Murad Narejo on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and Inspector Abdul Hafeez Chachar, Police Lines, Khairpur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files statements / comments on behalf of Respondents No.3, 4 and 5, respectively, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Learned AAG submits that Inspector Abdul Hafeez Chachar has now been transferred from Police Station, Sobhodero to Police Lines, Khairpur. On such statement, learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
